subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! Render praise unto His divine Unity, for thy countenance hath been illumined with the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله حمد کن حضرت احدیت را که بنور هدایت رویت منور شد
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Shrines and Holy places
